--- Commit Message ---
LU-17644 tests: add external fsx parameters

Add ability to set fsx_NUMOP, fsx_SEED and fsx_SIZE
as external parameters for sanity-benchmark and
sanityn.

Signed-off-by: Sergey Cheremencev <scherementsev@ddn.com>
